EnumFileLineValuesFeature
WorkspaceRoleapp/models/enums.py4OWNER = 'owner', MEMBER = 'member'Workspace Tenancy

DocumentStatusapp/models/enums.py15CREATED = 'created', PROCESSING = 'processing', INDEXED = 'indexed', FAILED = 'failed'Document Upload
MessageRoleapp/models/enums.py22USER = 'user', ASSISTANT = 'assistant', SYSTEM = 'system'Document Upload

Ingestion Pipeline Map

All supported ingestion sources normalize into ExtractedTextBlock records.

Upload / ConnectorLoaderExtractedTextBlock ChunkerEmbedderVector Store RetrieverAnswer GeneratorCitations
ModuleInputsOutputKey MetadataCitation MetadataTestsKnown Limitation
textTXT, MarkdownExtractedTextBlock with source_metadatafilename, source_typeSource metadatatests/test_admin_api.py
tests/test_chunker.py
tests/test_embedder.py
tests/test_health.py
tests/test_media_transcription.py		-
pdfPDF with OCR fallbackExtractedTextBlock with source_metadatapage_number, OCR flagSource metadatatests/test_chunker.py
tests/test_ocr_ingestion.py
tests/test_ocr_worker.py
tests/test_upload.py		-
officeDOCX, PPTXExtractedTextBlock with source_metadatasection, slide_number, table headersSlide/table/section contexttests/test_office_ingestion.pyComplex nested content simplified.
tablesCSV, XLSXExtractedTextBlock with source_metadatasheet_name, row ranges, column names, profileSheet and row rangetests/test_office_ingestion.py
tests/test_table_ingestion.py		Merged cells may normalize imperfectly.
ocrScanned PDF pages and imagesExtractedTextBlock with source_metadatapage_number, ocr_confidence, low_confidence, bounding_boxesPage and confidencetests/test_ocr_ingestion.py
tests/test_ocr_worker.py		Quality depends on scan quality.
transcribeTranscriptResult segmentsExtractedTextBlock with source_metadatatimestamps, language, segment windowsAudio/video timestamp rangetests/test_media_transcription.pyNo speaker diarization.
webSafe HTTPS URLExtractedTextBlock with source_metadataurl, final_url, title, content_typeWebsite URL and titletests/test_connectors_api.py
tests/test_web_ingestion.py		No browser-rendered JavaScript.
youtubeYouTube video ID or URLExtractedTextBlock with source_metadatavideo_id, timestamps, language, segment_countTimestamp rangetests/test_connectors_api.py
tests/test_youtube_ingestion.py		Requires transcript availability.
reposRepository ZIP archiveExtractedTextBlock with source_metadatarepo_name, file_path, language, line_start, line_endFile path and line range-ZIP only; not Git clone.
loaderUploaded file path and InputTypeExtractedTextBlock with source_metadataRoutes source typesSource metadatatests/test_ingestion_loader.py
tests/test_media_transcription.py
tests/test_repo_ingestion.py		-
typesShared normalized dataclassesExtractedTextBlock with source_metadataExtractedTextBlock, NormalizedDocument, InputTypeSource metadata--

Recommended Future Eval Cases

  • Add connector retrieval evals for web, YouTube, and repo citations.
  • Add OCR/media noisy-input eval cases when deterministic fixtures exist.
  • Add multi-document conflict evals for review and comparison workflows.

Quality and Operations Commands

  • ruff format .
  • ruff check .
  • pytest -q
  • python -m evals.run
  • cd web && npm run lint && npm run build
  • python scripts/generate_project_map.py
  • docker compose -f docker-compose.prod.yml up --build

CitationsSource drawer and metadata plumbing exist.LowRender connector-specific source labels everywhere.MediumFrontend

Persistent Vector StoreCurrent vector storage is local/in-memory oriented.HighAdd durable vector database adapter.HighBackend
Background WorkersFastAPI background tasks cover media.HighMove long OCR/media/repo jobs to a real queue.HighPlatform

OCR/MediaAdapters and fake-tested workers exist.MediumAdd production worker sizing and retry policy.MediumPlatform
